message:
test(snapshots): regenerate app and screen snapshot baselines

Update snapshot baselines for demo showcase screens to reflect current
rendering output with deterministic theme state.

Categories updated:
- app_*: Main application screens (dashboard, forms, data viz, etc.)
- dashboard_*: Dashboard-specific layouts at various terminal sizes
- theme_studio_*: Theme studio with token inspector and navigation
- snapshot_player_*: Snapshot playback controls and timeline

These baselines capture the visual output of each screen at standard
terminal sizes (80x24, 120x40, 40x10, 200x50) ensuring consistent
rendering behavior across the demo showcase.

New snapshots added:
- app_i18ndemo_80x24.snap: Internationalization demo screen
- app_performancehud_80x24.snap: Performance HUD overlay screen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
